title: CME Group 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for CME Group business model, revenue streams, risks, and market infrastructure context.

title: Globex: Electronic Trading
note: Product page describing CME Globex, access requirements, global electronic trading, connectivity, and trading platform role.

title: Clearing
note: Product page describing CME Clearing as a central counterparty for millions of daily transactions and a risk-mitigation service.

title: Financial Safeguards
note: CME source for financial safeguards, risk management standards, and clearinghouse stability claims.

title: CME Group Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization snapshot used for company valuation input.

title: CME Group P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for CME Group trailing P/E ratio in May 2026.

title: CME Group Stock Price, Financials, and Statistics
note: Market-data source for TTM revenue, net income, market cap, P/E, IPO date, and company profile context.

title: QuickFIX C++ FIX Engine Library
note: Open-source FIX engine used as a credible interoperability primitive for trading infrastructure alternatives.

title: Vega Protocol GitHub Repository
note: Open-source implementation of a decentralized derivatives trading protocol.

title: Vega Protocol Whitepaper
note: Technical source for decentralized derivatives market design, oracle use, and protocol-based market creation.

title: A Unified Framework and Comparative Study of Decentralized Finance Derivatives Protocols
note: Analytical source for the design space and risks of decentralized derivatives protocols.

title: Strata: The Open Source Library for Market Risk Analytics
note: Source describing Strata as an open-source market risk analytics library relevant to derivatives risk and margin tooling.

title: OpenGamma GitHub Organization
note: Repository source for OpenGamma Strata and related open-source risk analytics software.

title: Strata Documentation
note: Reference documentation for Strata pricing and risk analytics modules.

title: OpenTRMS Open Source Trading and Risk Management System
note: Open-source trade lifecycle and risk management project used as a cautious alternative candidate for clearing-adjacent workflows.
